examples: The computer management system of welding procedure for pressure vessels in developed with the general date dabs language FOXBASE.
In order to meet the requirements of water-power measurent and charge automation, develops the Water - Power Management System (short for SDF) by using FOXBASE.
Based on the design method of S. I. Karsay gating and risering and practical experience, Usering FOXBASE program software used to design riserless or small riser system was developed.
